name: Sherried Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 Pounds Chuck or round steak, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients into a crock pot.
2. Do not stir.
3. Cook on low for 24 hours.
4. This is a good make-ahead dish, especially for working people.
5. It tastes really good.
6. Serve with rice or buttered noodles.
